name: Sanremo — Spiaggia Tre Ponti
character: mixed sand and pebble, largest free Sanremo beach
blurb: Largest free beach in Sanremo with showers and boat rental, but the city-day register beats a pure beach day here: casino, Art Nouveau architecture, and the Russian Orthodox church are the actual draw. Car parking is hostile; Corso Trento Trieste trattorias are 15 minutes on foot from the beach.
